task.name: Map all HAS agents to tracker status feed
Add landscape command center view
task.description: Create a high-tech wide landscape view mapping all domains, agents, builds, and DORA telemetry.
task.done_definition: Landscape tab renders domains, agent grid, critical path, and build strips.
task.critical_path_reason: Foundational view of the advanced landscape command center.

task.name: Add gap analysis view
task.description: Build the gap list, capability matrix, risk register, and missing data reports.
task.done_definition: Gap Analysis tab renders capability coverage matrix and risk tables.
task.critical_path_reason: Verifies gaps in the project codebase and automation.

task.name: Add production speed / DORA metrics panel
task.description: Calculate and render lead time, deployment frequency, change fail rate, and rework hours.
task.done_definition: DORA metrics section displays throughput, stability, and lead time stats.

task.name: Add PERT / critical path landscape rail
task.description: Implement optimistic, likely, and pessimistic PERT task models to project path drag.
task.done_definition: PERT expected hours and critical path flags are displayed on the path rail.
task.critical_path_reason: Provides statistical backing for swarm projections.
task.next_action: Write E2E test specs for landscape

task.name: Add landscape and gap analysis E2E tests
task.description: Write Playwright spec files to verify render states, tooltip focus, and detail drawers.
task.done_definition: Playwright runs and reports 100% success on new specs.
task.critical_path_reason: Guarantees zero regressions in Landscape and Gap views.

task.name: Add launchd persistence plan
task.description: Design a plist daemon config to persist the node service on boot and sleep wakeup.
task.done_definition: Plists are mapped and detailed in docs, ready for user-approved activation.
task.critical_path_reason: Prepares server for always-on background tracking.
task.next_action: Verify E2E tests and obtain launchd installation approval

task.name: Restore live HAS API feed on port 8000
task.description: Restore live HAS API feed on port 8000 by checking Docker daemon health and launching compose services.
task.done_definition: Live HTTP API on port 8000 is accessible and registers healthy response.
task.critical_path_reason: Enables live Swarm orchestration truth linkage.
task.next_action: Check docker daemon status and start compose service

task.name: Restore live HAS API feed on port 8000
task.description: Restore live HAS API feed on port 8000 by checking Docker daemon health and launching compose services.
task.done_definition: Live HTTP API on port 8000 is accessible and registers healthy response.
task.critical_path_reason: Enables live Swarm orchestration truth linkage.
task.next_action: Check docker daemon status and start compose service

task.name: Add RACI heat map to Landscape and Gap Analysis
task.description: Render RACI agent load heat map, highlight overloaded agents, and recommend delegation/sub-agent splits.
task.done_definition: Tracker exposes raci_heatmap.json through /api/raci or /api/raci-heatmap and renders the heat map in Landscape/Gaps.
task.critical_path_reason: Visualizes coordination bottlenecks and highlights critical agent delegation recommendations.

task.name: Map all HAS agents to tracker status feed
task.description: Synchronize statuses of the 12 agents in the main swarm with data/status.json.
task.done_definition: All 12 agents have real-time statuses and runtime metrics updated in status.json.
task.critical_path_reason: Blocks swarm synchronization and local worker health validations.
task.next_action: Expose endpoint and hook to agent runner process

task.name: Map all HASF builds to tracker build feed
task.description: Synchronize statuses of the 9 DevSecOps builds with data/status.json.
task.done_definition: All 9 builds have exit codes, artifact targets, and logs mapped in status.json.
task.critical_path_reason: Blocks software factory build reporting and deployment metrics.

task.name: Ingest hochster71 GitHub project inventory
task.description: Clones all repositories from hochster71's GitHub account and generates metadata indexes.
task.done_definition: Consolidated list of GitHub repositories, hashes, and domains is logged.
task.critical_path_reason: Essential dependency to deduplicate codebase versions.
task.next_action: Configure GitHub PAT credentials and run fetch script

task.name: Ingest local hard drive project inventory
task.description: Traverses local storage directories to index code snippets, workspace configurations, and offline logs.
task.done_definition: Uncommitted local folders are scanned and indexed with path details.
task.critical_path_reason: Ensures no active local scripts are missed during consolidation.

task.name: Ingest Google Drive and iCloud Drive inventory
task.description: Gathers personal documents, budgeting files, checklists, and diet files from cloud storage mountpoints.
task.done_definition: All cloud files are resolved to absolute host paths and index metadata.
task.critical_path_reason: Critical for personal and business domain mapping.
task.next_action: Check directory mounts and list contents

task.name: Adopt HAS/HASF Shell Baseline v2
task.description: Refactor the tracker UI into the dark control-plane shell matching the approved prototype layout.
task.done_definition: Overview, side navigation, KPI cards, core architecture panel, registry, agent, build, RACI, gap, and evidence sections render from live data.
task.critical_path_reason: Sets up Baseline v2 layout control plane.
